name: Banana Oatmeal Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Steel-cut oats, soaked in 1/3 cup Boiling water until the mixture is at room temperature.
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the bread machine in the order specified for white bread.
2. Program the machine to make white bread.
3. The resulting bread will have the flavor and moistness of a banana quick bread, combined with the texture and crust of a yeast bread.
4. The riper the bananas, the more pronounced the flavor will be.
